name: I talked to insurance adjuster after back hurt at work, did I mess up?
description: Stop talking, get lawyer—adjusters deny claims; protect your statement[1].

mainEntity.name: I talked to insurance adjuster after back hurt at work, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stop talking, get lawyer—adjusters deny claims; protect your statement[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly, as adjusters seek to minimize payouts; don't give recorded statements without counsel.** They may use words against you[1]. **Key factors:** Any admissions of non-work cause or prior issues. **Practical guidance:** Politely end talks, say 'talk to my attorney,' hire one now. Review what you said. File claim anyway. **Common denial tactic[1].**
